title: Add "draft" icon to updates that haven't yet been published
excerpt: It would be great if the “Add Update” chat bubble icon could have a variation for when you have an update drafted but not yet submitted. Currently, if you draft an update but forget to hit submit, there’s no visual cue t…

posts.author: forda (Abbie Ford)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if the “Add Update” chat bubble icon could have a variation for when you have an update drafted but not yet submitted. Currently, if you draft an update but forget to hit submit, there’s no visual cue that there’s content drafted in that pulse without opening the pulse. This sometimes causes our team to run into delays with projects as they think they’ve submitted their update that is still in draft form or they don’t remember to come back to a drafted update to finalize and submit it.

On the table view, I’d love if the “Add Update” icon would turn orange or add a notification number if you’ve drafted an update but have not yet hit submit, similar to how it turns blue and adds a number bubble when someone has recently added a new update to the thread.

Monday.com pulse update icon example816×316 22.1 KB
